texto: The nonviolent approach does not immediately change the heart of the oppressor. It first does something to the hearts and souls of those committed to it. It gives them new self-respect
autor: it calls up resources of strength and courage they did not know they had.
explicacao: Citação de it calls up resources of strength and courage they did not know they had. sobre vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. “The nonviolent approach does not immediately change the heart of the oppressor.
